description: Premium, modern, fully responsive static website for a wellness and movement brand.
target_audience: People seeking premium wellness, movement, and creativity (Yoga, Dance, Arts) inspired by Apple, Equinox, Lululemon, and Nike Training.
design_philosophy: Minimal, elegant, luxurious, and calming. Matte black base with gold accents. Large editorial typography. Generous whitespace. Real photography treated with spotlights and clipped frames.

rules: Gold MUST ONLY be used as an accent (thin borders, signature line, small text, icon strokes).
Avoid bright gradients, colorful sections, and loud animations.
NEVER use generic full-screen gradients. If needed, use a subtle radial glow of #D4AF37 with 5% opacity.
Ensure text contrast ratios (WCAG AA). Do not use pure transparent backgrounds over images; use glassmorphism with blur and a semi-transparent black overlay.

headings.style: Elegant, editorial, slightly tight tracking for massive headings.

body.style: Clean, highly readable, generous line height.

rules: Use Cormorant Garamond exclusively for main and section headings.
Use Poppins exclusively for body, descriptions, buttons, and functional text.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase, tiny, with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

signature_identity_feature.description: A very thin flowing golden SVG line (#D4AF37) begins below the hero and subtly weaves through the entire page, connecting major sections.
signature_identity_feature.symbolism: Movement and breath. The flow should subconsciously resemble the letter 'Y' from Yuj.
signature_identity_feature.implementation: Use Framer Motion to draw the SVG line on scroll (`pathLength` animation using `useScroll`). The line should be 1px to 2px thick, gracefully intersecting between sections, looping slightly around the Gallery or Programs section, and branching at the Footer.

textures: Faint hexagonal texture in the Hero section (opacity 3-5%), inspired by the logo shape.
glassmorphism: Use for sticky nav on scroll and subtle UI overlays.
shadows: Soft, luxurious shadows. Dark mode ambient shadows. No harsh box-shadows.
corners: Rounded corners for cards and chips (`rounded-2xl` or `rounded-3xl` for modern feel).

libraries: framer-motion (for scroll reveals, layout animations, line drawing)
rules: Hero Load: Masked line-by-line reveal of the headline ('Where Movement Meets Mindfulness').
Cards: Lift slightly on hover (`-translate-y-2` and gold border glow).
Buttons: Subtle scale or fill animation.
Sections: Fade-in and slight slide-up (`y: 40, opacity: 0` to `y: 0, opacity: 1`) on scroll.
Marquee: One slow, tasteful editorial marquee using Framer Motion or react-fast-marquee.

hero.bg: Matte black (#0B0B0B) with faint hexagonal pattern and subtle spotlight/radial gradient.
hero.content: Centered circular Yuj Studio logo. Massive H1 'Where Movement / Meets Mindfulness'. Subheading 'Move. Learn. Create.'.
hero.elements: Elegant chips for programs, Primary CTA ('Book a Free Trial'), Secondary CTA ('Explore Programs').
hero.parallax: Subtle parallax on the background and floating program chips.

about_manifesto.style: Numbered manifesto chapters. Editorial layout. Huge numbers (e.g., '01', '02') in gold.
about_manifesto.layout: Asymmetrical text blocks with plenty of negative space.

programs.grid: Bento or clean 3x3 grid (9 cards). Cards must feel premium, using #171717 bg, subtle 1px gold border on hover.
programs.items: Yoga, Aerial Yoga, Zumba, Aerobics, Indian Dance, Western Dance, Drawing, Yoga Teacher Training, Kids Programs (Coming Soon).

more_than_fitness.layout: Horizontal scroll or staggered asymmetrical cards.

why_choose_yuj.content: 8 icon feature cards (Inclusive M&W, Certified Trainers, All Ages, Beginner Friendly, Holistic Wellness, Creative Learning, Positive Community, Flexible Timings).
why_choose_yuj.style: Minimalist icons (Phosphor or Lucide), #171717 cards, no clutter.

gallery.layout: Masonry grid. Real photography with spotlight and clipped frames (e.g., rounded arches or strict rectangles with inner borders).
gallery.hover: Grayscale to color on hover, or subtle scale-in.

marquee.style: Slow, outlined text (text-transparent stroke-gold) or massive #171717 text on #0B0B0B.

location_contact.content: Dumdum Private Road Bus Stop, Kolkata 700074, near WoW Momo + Google Maps embed. CTAs for WhatsApp/Phone/Email/Insta/FB.
location_contact.layout: Split section: Contact info and big CTA on the left, Map on the right.

components_and_libraries.ui: Shadcn UI (highly customized to remove the generic 'Vercel' look). Strip borders and standard radii, apply custom #171717 backgrounds, #D4AF37 accents, and luxury padding.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry, negative space, and typographic tension.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) only for overlays/nav.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Always target specific properties to avoid breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in CSS. Let the layout control alignment.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or crisp rectangles with a 1px border) with interaction animations.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive and key informational elements (kebab-case, role-based).
Use ONLY `.js` or `.jsx` extensions for React components. Do not use TypeScript (`.tsx`).
instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `npm install framer-motion @studio-freight/lenis lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`.
Set up Lenis globally in the main App component for smooth scrolling.
Implement the signature 'Y' flowing golden SVG line as an absolute positioned or fixed background element that draws itself via framer-motion's `useScroll` and `useTransform` hooks.
For the hero hexagonal texture, use an SVG pattern or purely CSS radial gradients mixed with a repeating pattern, keeping opacity under 5%.
Ensure the design remains strictly within #0B0B0B, #171717, #D4AF37, and grayscale text tones. Avoid all pure whites for large surfaces.
